hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; hook="$root/.codex/hooks/workflow-evidence.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then /bin/sh "$hook" post-tool-use "$root" edit; else echo "RepoGuard Codex: workflow evidence hook missing: $hook" >&2; fi'
hooks.statusMessage: RepoGuard Codex: recording edit workflow evidence
RepoGuard Codex: checking whitespace in local diff

hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; hook="$root/.codex/hooks/workflow-evidence.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then /bin/sh "$hook" subagent-start "$root" subagent; else echo "RepoGuard Codex: workflow evidence hook missing: $hook" >&2; fi'
hooks.statusMessage: RepoGuard Codex: recording subagent start evidence

hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; hook="$root/.codex/hooks/workflow-evidence.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then /bin/sh "$hook" subagent-stop "$root" subagent; else echo "RepoGuard Codex: workflow evidence hook missing: $hook" >&2; fi'
hooks.statusMessage: RepoGuard Codex: recording subagent stop evidence

hooks.command: /bin/sh -c 'root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd)"; hook="$root/.codex/hooks/workflow-evidence.sh"; if [ -f "$hook" ]; then /bin/sh "$hook" stop "$root" turn; else echo "RepoGuard Codex: workflow evidence hook missing: $hook" >&2; fi'
